{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dross's purple coin
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can forge a shimmering purple coin.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
